# Closeout Report Template

## Conclusion

Write the final status and plain meaning.

## What Changed

List code, document, run, or policy changes.

## What Gates Passed

List each executed gate and its status.

## What Gates Were Not Applicable

List each skipped gate with a concrete reason.

## What Is Still Not Enforced

List declared gaps, missing implementations, or future hardening.

## Allowed Claims

List claims allowed by final claim guard.

## Forbidden Claims

List claims forbidden by final claim guard.

## Next Hardening Step

State the next concrete operating-system improvement.
